original_prompt: Generate comprehensive unit tests for the file: test_ash.py

tasks.title: Read current test_ash.py to understand structure and function under test
tasks.description: Read scratch/test_ash.py to analyze the send_completion_request function and existing test logic before writing new tests.

tasks.title: Create comprehensive unit test file for test_ash.py
tasks.description: Create a new file scratch/test_ash_unit.py containing full unit tests for the send_completion_request function using unittest or pytest framework. Include tests for: valid request success, invalid URL handling, empty payload, missing API key, network errors (timeout, connection error), HTTP error responses (4xx/5xx), invalid JSON response, and environment variable loading.

tasks.title: Update test_ash.py to use environment variables securely
tasks.description: Modify scratch/test_ash.py to load the Authorization header from os.getenv('ASHBORN_API_KEY') instead of hardcoded 'your-api-key-here', and add basic input validation for url and payload parameters.

tasks.title: Run unit tests to verify implementation
tasks.description: Execute 'python -m pytest scratch/test_ash_unit.py -v' to run the comprehensive unit tests and confirm all test cases pass successfully.
